title: Nebula Web3 React Landing Page Template
description: A reusable landing page template for Web3 infrastructure platforms to showcase APIs, node performance, developer tools, analytics, and product trust.

{/* Main Feature Card: License Benefits */}
{/* Text Content */}

High-Performance API Integration

Connect to the decentralized web with Nebula's unified API surface. Designed for speed, reliability, and infinite scale.

Our SDKs provide type-safe access to over 50+ protocols with a single line of code. Eliminate node maintenance and focus on building your application logic with 99.99% uptime guaranteed.

Instant global state access — stream events, query historical data, and broadcast transactions with sub-millisecond latency.

seo_description: A reusable landing page template for Web3 infrastructure platforms to showcase APIs, node performance, developer tools, analytics, and product trust.
seo_keywords: Landing Page, Technology, Dark, Futuristic, Gradient, Animated, Documentation, Clean, Web3, SaaS
long_description:
## Overview
**Nebula** is a sleek, dark-mode **Web3 infrastructure landing page template** built for blockchain platforms, node providers, API products, and developer tooling brands.

- Bold hero section with animated headline and primary CTA
- Feature blocks for APIs, uptime, latency, indexing, and protocol access
- Developer-focused UI with code snippets, status cards, and live metrics
- Mobile dashboard mockup for analytics, nodes, and on-chain activity
- Footer with product, docs, company, and legal navigation

## Best For
Use this template to launch a **marketing site for Web3 infrastructure products** targeting developers, startups, and protocol teams.

## Benefits
- Communicates technical credibility fast
- Highlights reliability, scale, and observability
- Supports product storytelling with premium visuals
- Ideal for API platforms, RPC providers, and dApp tooling
